name: python3-simple-websocket
title: python3-simple-websocket
summary: Simple WebSocket server and client for Python
description:
Simple WebSocket server and client for Python
simple-websocket includes a collection of WebSocket servers and clients for
Python, including support for both traditional and asynchronous (asyncio)
workflows. The servers are designed to be integrated into larger web
applications if desired.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-simple-websocket because Simple WebSocket server and client for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-simple-websocket as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-simple-websocket with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-simple-websocket --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
